# DM Sequence Template

## Message 1 - Triggered opener

`Hey [first_name] - saw [specific trigger].`
`Curious if [short qualifying question]?`

## Message 2 - Value add

`Quick context: teams in your position usually hit [pain].`
`I can share [resource or breakdown] if useful.`

## Message 3 - Qualification

`If this is relevant, which is the bigger blocker today: [A] or [B]?`

## Message 4 - Route

`Based on that, best next step is [resource/call/nurture].`
`Want me to send it?`

## Message 5 - Close or revisit

`No pressure if timing is off. Should I close this for now or revisit in [time window]?`
